body:
Mestre Pintado,

Estou treinando os toques todo dia — Angola, São Bento Grande e Iúna. Vou conduzir a bateria na cerimônia como o senhor pediu. Mando o cronograma final esta semana.

Axé, Mestre.
— Angela
subject: Re: Avaliação de Mestre Instrutor - 14/11

body: Roots family! Saturday's classes are on as usual — kids block at 10:30, open adult/teen roda at noon. Batizado sign-ups for Nov 14 are now live; corda assignments will be set by mid-October so come consistent. Membership link and waiver in the group. Axé!\n\n— Angela
subject: This week at Roots Martial Arts Academy

body: Marcus — let's lock the Saturday 75-miler. Roll out 6:30am from Folsom, food stop in Auburn ~mile 40, easy zone-1 recovery spin Sunday. I'll bring extra electrolyte tabs. Send the GPX when you've got it.\n\n— Angela
subject: Re: Century training - back-to-back long days

body:
Anita,

Happy to take the Friday 3pm cyclist eval. I'll block the room and pull the intake. If it's a chronic IT-band case I'll want 45 minutes, not 30.

Thanks,
Angela
subject: Re: Friday 3pm ortho eval

body:
Linda,

Q4 Roots numbers are uploaded. The lease bump pushes break-even to ~52 students at current pricing. I don't want to raise dues mid-belt-cycle. Can we talk options before the Jan 15 estimated payment?

Obrigada,
Angela
subject: Roots Q4 + break-even under new rent

body:
Hello,

I build my own capoeira training staffs and small furniture. Looking for 1x2 red oak and ash, straight grain, kiln-dried. What's your minimum order and lead time for the next month?

Thank you,
Angela Fry
subject: Red oak + ash for training staffs

body:
Famílias,

Our annual Batizado e Troca de Cordas is Saturday, November 14 at the studio. Mestre Pintado will be evaluating, and every student tests. More details and the potluck signup to follow. Axé!

— Angela
subject: Roots Belt Ceremony — Nov 14, save the date

body:
Hello,

Our studio liability policy renews December 1. Please send the renewal quote and confirm the certificate of insurance still lists the community arts building landlord as additional insured.

Thank you,
Angela Fry, Roots Martial Arts Academy
subject: Roots liability policy — Dec 1 renewal

body:
Dr. Nair,

Tereza's fasting numbers have been steady (120s–130s). Her hip is stronger but she's still cane-dependent on stairs. Could we get the next check-in on a Thursday afternoon so I can bring her after clinic?

Thank you,
Angela
subject: Tereza Fry — follow-up scheduling

body:
Hello,

Confirming two riders for the 100-mile route on October 18 — Angela Fry and Marcus Chen. Please send the start-corral info and the SAG stop map when available.

Thanks,
Angela
subject: Century registration — Oct 18
